notes.professional: Job title, employer, industry, skills, career goals
notes.educational: Degrees, institutions, certifications, fields of study
notes.family: Spouse/partner, children, parents, siblings, family structure
notes.location: Home city, home country, neighborhood, time zone
notes.medical: Not auto-promoted by default. Add to auto_promote or approval_required per user preference.
notes.financial: Not auto-promoted by default. Sensitive category.
notes.preference: General preferences (food, hobbies, communication style). Not auto-promoted — these are learned over time via reactivation patterns.
notes.project: Active projects and work streams. Not auto-promoted — these change frequently.
